title: Midnight-Craving Irish Sherry Stew
description: A resinous, shaggy stew that will satisfy your midnight cravings, featuring sweet sherry and a hint of tandoor spices. This high-protein-friendly dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the onions and cook until they are softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the sherry, red wine, tandoor spice blend, flour, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, until the liquid has thickened slightly.
Transfer the stew to the tandoor and cook for 30 minutes, or until the lamb is tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
